hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    cmd = data.get('command', '')
    import re
    if re.search(r'\\bnpm\\b', cmd):
        print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': 'This project uses bun, not npm. Use bun instead (e.g. bun install, bun add, bun run, bun remove).'})) 
except: pass
"
